> useful for web research, but requires `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` and broad network/CLI scope; keep global-only unless explicitly requested.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add firecrawl/cli --skill firecrawl-cli-all -y -g
```

**Use:** `/firecrawl-cli-all`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add firecrawl/cli --skill firecrawl-cli-all -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: useful for web research, but requires `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` and broad network/CLI scope; keep global-only unless explicitly requested.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Firecrawl CLI skill bundle for live web capabilities inside agents: search, scrape single URLs, map site structure, crawl for bulk content, browser automation, structured extraction to LLM-friendly markdown/JSON. Enables agents to fetch fresh external data without leaving the editor/terminal.

## Install Prerequisites

Install (per listings): `npx skills add firecrawl/cli --skill firecrawl-cli-all` (or named selectors); may require API key / login; global-only per catalog rationale summary; policy=Inspect for usage policy, auth, and cost exposure before global or broad install.

## Upstream Maintainer

[firecrawl/cli](https://github.com/firecrawl/cli) (Firecrawl team)

## Comparable Alternatives

Other web-scrape/fetch skills (e.g. browserless, puppeteer skills); built-in search tools in some agents; tavily or similar search MCP/tools.

&gt; Evidence synthesized from public web sources (GitHub repos, official docs, skill registries); confidence reflects source reputation and public signals only. Not an endorsement.
